mapper.select:
select sat.audit_flag , sat.menu_cd , sm.menu_nm , sat.audit_trail_contents , sat.insert_datetime from sys_audit_trail sat left join sys_menu sm on sm.menu_cd = sat.menu_cd where 1=1
and ( sm.menu_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sat.audit_trail_contents like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
and sat.insert_datetime between #{startDate} and #{endDate} order by sat.insert_datetime desc
